item.title: Windows battery report
item.description: Some tips are awesome, got this one from a colleague.. How to check the battery of your laptop? (health, runtime, …)

item.title: VMware vSphere Client downloads
item.description: For future reference, here are all the VMware vSphere Client downloads.

item.title: Running Odoo with https
item.description: It has gotten so easy to use https since https://letsencrypt.org/ opened up. Not only can you get free ssl certificates but even more important, automate the process! That’s how it should be!

item.title: Go, build for a different architecture
item.description: It happened that I needed to (re)build a small program for an i386 machine. This was about the same time I realized we still had those… It’s very easy but since I’ll not be using this a lot I wanted to document it.

item.title: Cheat Sheets
item.description: The homepage of Cheatography not only has a nice collection but you can also generate and share your own cheat sheets.

item.title: Useful git commands
item.description:
Here are some Git commands I frequently use, together with a short explanation.

Also, I don’t like to type long commands but I don’t mind fancy results. No problem, aliases to the rescue!

And last (but not least) is a list of some fine Git resources.

item.title: First post with Hugo
item.description: I was a little bored with the previous look and decided to play around with some other static HTML generators. I did like that I could edit the website directly in GitHub but I still decided to move away from the current setup with “Jekyll Now”. It’s more fun to edit files in atom anyway.
